reviews.review_description: Most people doesnt get the concept and giving bad reviews. Thats how roguelike work .you restart from scratch each time but get monwy to unlock new skills and level up .the more you play the longer you will last.checkout on console vampire survivors,brotato,cloverpit,balatro. thats how roguelike and roguelite works guys! This game ia fire and i played atleassssttt 1000 vr games and all the AAA ones(not pcvr)
It’s like mad max in vr but if you were fighting a bunch of post apocalyptic knockoff minions. Super fun, awesome art style, only issue is that it is insanely difficult.  Other than that, super fun.

I hate it. You have a weak gun, have to reload and do everything with your off hand.
Can't dodge properly, shield is no where near enough power against all these attacks. And you just keep starting again! Have to do all waves from the begin when you die.

You don't keep or Unlock any upgrades to use again you just start from scratch every run.

It's not fun it's frustrating

reviews.review_title: Need more great games like this
reviews.review_description: Love this style of game for VR. I wish there were more. Be nice if they made house of the dead VR game. Great game hope you guys are making new ones

Cuter than the Mad Max universe, clearly, Gazzlers is still a great game that gives a taste of what it would be like to be a part of those on wheel wars in the Mad Max films.

The cuter art style is well done, graphics are nice and crisp with a good draw distance. Gameplay is addictive and suitable for kids and adults the like.
Great game that's very addictive. Definitely worth the price. You can avoid the bullets by either using the shield or by doging them (which is a really good workout after a while).

The game could possibly be fun, and I'm sure it is for many others, butbthr difficulty is just WAY too ridiculous...

I've played a little over 3-4 days now, and even on "EASY" (huge quotation marks...), I have been unable to get past 3 Waves innthe FIRST biome.
I have one ability maxed out, 2 on Lv. 2, and  other on Lv.1. That's how much fu***ng scrap I've collected TRYING to beat the first god**mn biome alone on EASY!...
It's basically impossible to dodge all shots, the shield is hardly useful enough to make up for that issue, and on top of all of that you die pretty quickly as well.
On the opposite end of that you have enemies that take WAY too much damage (even on Easy) and you'll be surprised much of the time. So can't dodge 80% of the fires shot at you, surrounded by fast moving enemies that take to die, and you are taking countless hits just trying to kill 1 enemy/ reload/ heal/ or ANYTHING, all because you can't do much and your shield lasts all of 2 seconds!...
Make your game impossibly challenging, sure; but an EASY setting shouldn't STILL be this godd**n frustrating even on the first levels! I can't imagine how utterly ridiculous the devs got AFTER the first levels, let alone the higher difficulties...
And this game likely makes you completely start over from the very beginning of the first biome even if you've made it all the way to the end of the 3rd biome, because" f**k you" is the name of the game (as it is with most Rogue-like games as well I guess).

If you are masachistic, sure- get ghe game I guess. 
If you are one that enjoys more from your games than dying with little to no reward or progression (even on EASY), then look elswhere and save your money, your time, and your sanity...
There's much better games to play if you want to shoot things.

Great Arcade! with Great Graphics!
I hope the Developers makes more games like this one!!!!!!!

I love this game but why we have to start all over again…why we can’t start off where we got out at….it a good games also crazy to it keeps me laughing 😂…. It should be a check point really do love this game it make me laugh a lots
Game looks cool just got it can't wait to try it out also I think It would be cool if they addedbhand tracking.

I'm done with rougelite games it's just not my thing. I think it's just an excuse to make a short game. The thing that drives me absolutely crazy is the fact my gun doesn't reload every time I swipe my hand left and push the button.  I noticed if I don't actually look at the amo box it doesn't reload, even when I do look it's not reliable. Nothing like a faulty game . It's almost impossible to pass the 2nd level, in my opinion the DEVS did it intentionally because there's nothing after that.

developer_response.body:
Hi GSorm619,

It's unfortunate that you're unable to progress and experience it yourself. There are many things to do, even after completing the pilgrimage. For example, completing the Boss Turbo Waves, completing the database, unlocking all the trophies, trying to complete the game at Nightmare, etc., with even more to come in the next update.

If you haven't noticed it, our game also has some different difficulty levels. This might also help you.

If you want some extra tips or are experiencing any problems, please get in touch with us at support@boltblastergames.com or our Discord. We and our community are happy to help you out.

Kind regards,
Bolt Blaster Games

reviews.review_title: Every time I hear menu music I dance
reviews.review_description:
This game shared with me so many different vibes:) 
Mothergunship way of upgrades with the choice out of two Until You Fall style.
- easy and catchy gunplay
- perfect combination of time management mechanics 
- Comics style setting
- extreme catchy main menu soundtrack
- perks
I just this title a lot, this is a must have game.

A lot of paid reviews here. Ignore them. This is just another on-rail vr shooter like it's 2016. Blazed through it without much strategy. Not enough content for the money. Voice gets irritating fast. Graphics look nice though, but not enough depth for me. Sorry

developer_response.body:
Hi Tobias,

That's not the case!

This is a roguelite shooter and not a standard rail shooter. Completing all the biomes without much strategy shouldn't be possible!

We're very interested in a playthrough so we can analyze it. If you could share this on our Discord, that would be very helpful to gain information and to improve the game.

Thanks for sharing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description:
I decided to give it a try, and once you start, you just can't stop. It offers an incredibly enjoyable and addictive experience. The aesthetics and artistic design are phenomenal, with a hint of Mad Max or Borderlands but with a completely fresh and laid-back vibe. The sound design is also fantastic. 
100% Recommended!!

Feel like a real gunfighter of the wilderness with this amazing game.
Every time you finish a game you want to start another round and so on until you realize that hours and hours have passed!!!
I love it!!

Absolut winning formula. Really fun, hooks you at the second game, good characters and enviornment. (I really enjoyed using japanese voices :D )

I genuinely enjoy this game. It is really fun. However, I noticed today that the scrap I collect and the amount given to me is vastly different. It's lower than the number when I am done with the waves. On one particular game, it says I had zero scrap which I know is untrue. Can someone please respond to this?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for letting us know. Can you give us some more information in our Discord? We would love to investigate this issue!

Thanks in advance!
Bolt Blaster Games

reviews.review_description:
I am hooked. This game scratches an itch I haven't felt in VR in a long time.

I've seen people complain, but I think the difficulty is perfect. It doesn't try to hold your hand, and the meta-upgrades really let you know it's skill-based rather than a 'slow grind'. The game throws you in with minor explanations and it's all you from there. 

I currently can't recommend this over the suspiciously similar game Mothergunship Forge. If the developers continue to add interesting and unique features and/or systems, perhaps level variety, they could very easily change my mind. It's a 5 stars for me regardless.

Oh, and I suggest muting the voices. The gazzlers will still make noise, and the robot will stop repeating the same few lines. Happy the option is there :)

reviews.review_title: Fun game but need more attachments
reviews.review_description: Had the game for 1 day and a half and have beat it and know I am 9 on the leaderboard was fun to get there but would of like more attachments for the gun or different one for the gun or a different gun to start. Just saying it a good game but could of made the game more interesting.(my god was the last boss hard)

developer_response.body:
Hi fig.2022,

We're planning to add these kinds of things soon.

Keep an eye out! 

Kind regards,
The Bolt Blaster Games team

reviews.review_description: I feel Gazzlers is the kind of game I'll keep playing during years. The runs are short and pure fun, you can't just play it once. Nice addition to the Quest catalog.

I thought this was going to be a boring game, but I was wrong……. I really enjoy playing this game even though I’m still at the beginning level but it keeps me motivated, plus I can get my exercise in.   The game is really great even the price. I highly recommend this game.

Hi love the game I hella dope I just got and I wanted to ask if u could make a multiplayer thing on it and this game is so cool I love I could not get of it and me and my friend want to do double on it so may u add multiplayer please 😁
It’s a lot of fun! Perfect to have good time with friends and spend hours! Unbeatable experience!
A very funny game with nice graphics!!

From the time you start playing you are already having fun. You just press play and game begins instantly. Tutorial is fast and easy to understand. Once you perform the tutorial you get the grip (no pun intended) in less than a minute. Game is fast paced, always interesting and keeps you constantly focused. The progression feels really natural. From time to time you get new gadgets and some of them are new weapons that change enormously the mechanics and feels of the game. There's also a talent-like progression that you keep for the next games. Graphics are spot on, very funny and beautiful and if you mix that with the game sound the immersion is total. I highly recommend this game.

Been following this since beta. They didnt make the progress that I hoped to see. The game is short and shallow. All sort of annoying things like no left handed. They even got the unity logo of shame on startup. Also, the robot guy was funny in beta. Why change? Overall, not worth it. Ill refund

developer_response.body:
Hi Darkfader,

Thanks for sharing your thoughts!
The left-handed mode has been added in the 1.1 update.

Kind regards,
Bolt Blaster Games

reviews.review_description: My girlfriend is going to break up with me

OMG killing those kinds of angry minions is so much fun! The upgrades to the handcrafted weapons are very cool, and the upgrade system convinces me. The atmosphere of the game is so frenetic and exciting. Don't hesitate to try this magnificent arcade, will makes you crazy! 🤪

reviews.review_title: A pure fun designed for VR
reviews.review_description: Gazzlers is a fun ride specially for VR that utilizes every aspect of VR possible to ensure gamers are fully engaged and the fun is non stop. You fight and die but keep your scraps to upgrade your skills and try again. A few tries will get your hands on the game mechanism and you will get a hang of it, after that you try again and again. My only complain is the Easy mode should be made more easy to progress through (hoping with an update that can be done - developers please make this happen) as I find the game to be ridiculously hard even on an Easy mode. The graphics are astonishing and gameplay is fluid and is one of the games enhanced for Quest 3. The game is a must for any VR owner for a quick pick n play session.

Since the release, I haven't stopped playing, much better than I expected!! Every match, I get a little further, and the power-ups are amazing! I don't know how long it will last, but I'm sure I have many hours ahead

This is a great title on Quest 3! Lots to unlock and upgrade. Fun shooting combat. If you like arcade style shooters and rogue-likes, then you will love this game! 

If you don’t like rogue-likes then you will probably not enjoy it.
Awesome game but difficult you need to focus and bolts empty fast

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing! If you haven't already, try our different difficulty modes, starting with easy.

That might help!

reviews.review_description:
This one is a little too simplistic for me to pay for as a full price game.  This is more like an arcade game at Dave and Busters where you pop in a quarter and only expect about 5 minutes of fun out of it before you die or have to pump more quarters in.  It's straightforward, very repetitive, and a number of the "upgrades" you get for winning a level feel like downgrades and make the game feel more like a chore.

Having said all that... If you get it on sale and just want an arcade style rail shooter with little progression or depth, just wanna shoot things without much thought involved, and you're willing to figure out which "upgrades" suck and avoid them if possible, it's good for just a quick mindless run and gun here and there.

It is a brand new on the rails shooter and it is a workout. Even if you aren't the best at it in the beginning, you will want to keep trying. There are four different difficulty levels, which is really nice. You can start with easy and then work your way up to nightmare.
I says Best Game Ever!


Here get 1/4 off for gazzler
🅣🅡🅚🅢🅣🅡.🅑🅘🅞.🅛🅘🅝🅚

I feel like this is the best VR-game I ever played... (for real)
The art style is something I haven't seen before, very cartoony, the voicelines made me laugh out loud and the amount of ways you can go trough a level surpriced me. For example when I found out you can not only block bullets, but also dodge them!
At first you will struggle... A lot! But it takes some time to get better at the game, every round you play you unlock more things and learn new ways!

I would 10/10 recommend this game to everyone! 
Have fun playing!

Gazlers have not been running since a few days ago. When I run the game, it's loading, but it's not progressing. There are several people in Korea who are experiencing the same symptoms.Please check and take a look

developer_response.body:
Hello Bluesky,

I am sorry to hear that you are facing an issue. This shouldn't happen, of course, and we would like to help you resolve it. Can you please send us a detailed explanation of the problem you are facing at support@boltblastergames.com? 

We recommend that you try reinstalling the game. As we support cloud save, you should be able to recover your progression.

Please let us know if this resolves the issue. 

Please let us know where this issue is being discussed so we can thoroughly investigate.

Best regards, 
Bolt Blaster Games

reviews.review_description:
It's fun.
The graphics are clean with cartoon rendering.
The game feels like FPS + vampire survival.
You start hunting with a basic gun and progress by upgrading your weapon through options at certain stages. And you can collect gold to increase your stats.
Low price + Fun = Recommended

The downside is that your legs get tired because you have to play standing to avoid bullet.
